questions.text: Does your baby sometimes make throaty or sounds?
Does your baby make cooing sounds such as "ooo" ,"gah", and "aah"?
When you speak to your baby, does she or he make sounds back to you?
Does your baby smile when you talk to him or her?
Does your baby chuckle softly?
After you have been out of sight, does you baby smile or get excited when she or he sees you?
